_note: Media library content. Add entries below and commit — media.html renders them automatically. Videos are link-outs (no tracking embeds): swap the url to change a video, optionally swap the self-hosted thumb (CSP forbids hotlinking), set archived:true to move it to the archive panel. Audio files live in assets/media/audio/, photos in assets/media/img/.

videos.label: gartner · it symposium/xpo
videos.title: Gartner’s Top Tech Trends for 2026
videos.description: The official keynote, live from IT Symposium/Xpo — Gartner’s top technology trends for 2026, straight from the source.

videos.label: openai · codex
videos.title: Introducing the Codex app
videos.description: A command centre for building with agents: parallel multitasking with worktree isolation, reusable skills, and scheduled automations running in the background.

videos.label: security · agentic ai
videos.title: Agentic AI in the Wild: Rethinking Trust When Your AI Has the Keys
videos.description: Confidential computing and modern infrastructure for securing agentic AI — when agents hold credentials and operate in production.

audio.title: The OWASP Crosswalk for Agentic Applications
audio.description: Where the AIUC-1 standard meets the OWASP agentic top ten — which controls map, which gaps remain, and what to do about agent identity, containment, and supply-chain attestation.
